teaching.concept: A compact README quick start separates installation, usage, commands, and supporting documentation.
teaching.howTo: Use one title, two H2 sections, a language-tagged command fence, two numbered steps, two inline-code spans in the Try it section, and one descriptive link.
teaching.example:
# Image sizer

## Install

```bash
npm install image-size
```

candidates.title: Write a log filter quick start
candidates.prompt: Rebuild a compact README quick start for installing and trying a log filter.
candidates.target:
# Log filter quick start

## Install

```bash
npm install clear-log
```

## Try it

1. Run `clear-log app.log`
2. Open `filtered.log`

[Read the filter guide](/docs/filter-guide)

teaching.example:
# Delayed search

## Observed

> Results appear after the spinner stops.

## Reproduce

candidates.title: Write a stale config cache report
candidates.prompt: Rebuild a compact bug report with an observed symptom, reproduction, evidence, and a verification command.
candidates.target:
# Stale config cache

## Observed

> A saved theme still uses the previous value after reload.

## Reproduce

1. Save the new theme
2. Reload the settings page

## Evidence

```text
expected=light actual=dark
```

Run `npm test -- config-cache`.

candidates.title: Write a lost draft shortcut report
candidates.prompt: Rebuild a compact bug report for a keyboard shortcut that clears a saved draft.
candidates.target:
# Lost draft shortcut

## Observed

> The save shortcut clears the second paragraph before storage finishes.

## Reproduce

1. Write two paragraphs
2. Press the save shortcut

## Evidence

```text
savedLines=1 expectedLines=2
```

Run `npm test -- draft-shortcut`.

candidates.title: Write a duplicate webhook retry report
candidates.prompt: Rebuild a compact bug report for a webhook retry that records one event twice.
candidates.target:
# Duplicate webhook retry

## Observed

> One retry stores the same delivery identifier twice.

## Reproduce

1. Send one delayed callback
2. Allow the retry to finish

## Evidence

```text
deliveryRows=2 expectedRows=1
```

Run `npm test -- webhook-retry`.

candidates.title: Write a missing CLI flag report
candidates.prompt: Rebuild a compact bug report for a CLI flag that disappears from help output.
candidates.target:
# Missing CLI flag

## Observed

> The quiet flag works but does not appear in the help list.

## Reproduce

1. Generate the command help output
2. Search for the quiet flag

## Evidence

```text
flag=--quiet helpEntry=missing
```

Run `npm test -- cli-help`.

# Keep upload order

- Update `uploadQueue.ts`
- Preserve file order

candidates.title: Write a duplicate export PR description
candidates.prompt: Rebuild a compact pull-request description for preventing duplicate exports.
candidates.target:
# Guard duplicate exports

## Change

- Update `exportQueue.ts`
- Keep existing file names

## Boundary

> Do not merge separate export requests.

## Verify

```bash
npm test -- export-queue
```

[Related export issue](/issues/export-duplicates)
